title: Kanteletar: Finnish Folk Poetry
description: The Kanteletar is the companion collection to the Kalevala — Finnish folk lyrics on love, sorrow, and the hardness of life.
introduction: The Kanteletar is the companion collection to the Kalevala — Finnish folk lyrics on love, sorrow, and the hardness of life.

translation.text: My joy is small, my sorrow great. My path leads into the forest. The cuckoo calls, but not for me. Who will sing at my wedding? No one. Who will weep at my grave? The rain.
